health_conditions: chronic GI issues (bloating, constipation, internal trembling, heartburn, sharp left-sided pain)

benefits.description: BPC-157 combined with fasting and restrictive diet keeps GI symptoms in check

side_effects.description: GI flare-ups return when testing tolerance with coffee or sugar despite BPC use

protocol_notes: Injects BPC-157 daily at 1mg dose. Currently transitioning to oral BPC. Uses restrictive diet and fasting alongside peptide. Symptoms triggered by stress-related hard drinking, not fully diagnosed by doctors. Reports similar symptom progression to OP.
